page_content:
UMD Essentials

Email – The Official University Correspondence

TERPmail and UMD Gmail are used for official communications to students. Students are responsible for checking official university email on a regular basis. Academic advisors, faculty, and campus administrative offices use email to communicate important and time- sensitive notices.

accept admission to UMD. This account will be treated as the official university email address for academic and personal use for undergraduate students after they register for classes.

For technical support visit umd.service-now. com/itsupport or contact the IT Service Desk at 301-405-1500 or itsupport@umd.edu.
